Subject: A tiny baby
Event: At the somber grave, a mourner gently holds a tiny baby who lets out a sorrowful cry, their tear mingling with the drizzle as they both share a quiet moment of loss.
story_prompts: The same A tiny baby cries softly, nestled in the arms of a mourner beneath a gray, overcast sky in a quiet cemetery with scattered autumn leaves.
The same A tiny baby gazes upward, tear rolling down the cheek, while the mourner crouches in front of a simple, weathered grave framed by damp earth.
The same A tiny baby extends a small hand toward vibrant wreaths laid gently against the grave, delicate raindrops starting to fall in the background.
The same A tiny baby rests silently against the mourner’s chest, both surrounded by swirling mist and faded wreaths by the freshly tended grave.
